lines: Rolling through the city streets,
Finding joy in everyone we meet,
Arts and music fill the air,
A community that shows it cares.
Wheels of joy, spinning free,
Together we are all we need,
Wheelie Fun Hub, our place to be,
Arts Mobile Community.
Paint and music, dance and song,
Every voice where it belongs,
Mobile arts across the land,
Reaching out a helping hand.
Wheels of joy, spinning free,
Together we are all we need,
Wheelie Fun Hub, our place to be,
Arts Mobile Community.
We roll together, side by side,
With open hearts and open minds,
No matter where the road may go,
Our community will always grow.
Wheels of joy, spinning free,
Together we are all we need,
Wheelie Fun Hub, our place to be,
Arts Mobile Community.
Every star has got a light to share,
Every voice deserves to fill the air,
When we come together as one,
Beautiful things can be done.
Shine together, shine together,
Brighter when we're side by side,
Shine together, shine together,
Let your inner light shine wide.
Music is the language of the soul,
Art and dance can make the broken whole,
From the youngest to the old,
Every story must be told.
Shine together, shine together,
Brighter when we're side by side,
Shine together, shine together,
Let your inner light shine wide.
Get up on your feet, let's move today,
Everyone is welcome here to play,
Music fills our hearts with so much fun,
Let's dance together, everyone.
Move and groove, feel the beat,
From your head down to your feet,
Move and groove, let's celebrate,
This community is really great.
Left and right, up and down,
Biggest smiles in this town,
Old and young, big and small,
Wheelie Fun Hub loves us all.
Move and groove, feel the beat,
From your head down to your feet,
Move and groove, let's celebrate,
This community is really great.
Red and blue and yellow too,
Every color shining through,
Like the art we paint each day,
Washing all the grey away.
Colors of life, painting our world,
Every brushstroke, every swirl,
Colors of life, bold and bright,
Filling every day with light.
Green of nature, sky of blue,
Endless shades in everything we do,
Arts and crafts and songs we sing,
Joy is the color that we bring.
Colors of life, painting our world,
Every brushstroke, every swirl,
Colors of life, bold and bright,
Filling every day with light.
When the world feels heavy on your heart,
Remember we will never be apart,
Every challenge makes us strong,
In this community we all belong.
Together we rise, higher than before,
Together we rise, opening every door,
Hand in hand, we face the day,
Together we rise, together we'll find a way.
From the arts to music to dance and more,
Each of us brings something to explore,
Celebrating what makes each unique,
This is the future that we seek.
Together we rise, higher than before,
Together we rise, opening every door,
Hand in hand, we face the day,
Together we rise, together we'll find a way.
We are the arts, we are the song,
We are the place where you belong,
Mobile community, always near,
Wheelie Fun Hub — we're all here.
